kept.title: AutoVerus: Automated Proof Generation for Rust Code.
kept.reason: LLM agent network for automated proof generation in Rust verifier Verus, integrating formal verification.

kept.title: Large Language Model Powered Symbolic Execution.
kept.reason: LLMs directly integrated with symbolic execution for program analysis, using path constraints and semantic reasoning.

kept.title: Active Learning for Neurosymbolic Program Synthesis.
kept.reason: Active learning for neurosymbolic program synthesis; handles neural mispredictions via conformal evaluation for semantic correctness.

kept.title: Laurel: Unblocking Automated Verification with Large Language Models.
kept.reason: LLMs generate assertions to unblock SMT-based program verifiers (Dafny), integrating formal verification with AI.

kept.title: Memory-Safety Verification of Open Programs with Angelic Assumptions.
kept.reason: LLM mines code patterns for formal synthesis of angelic assumptions in memory-safety verification, integrating AI with program analysis.

kept.title: Interleaving Large Language Models for Compiler Testing.
kept.reason: LLMs generate code for compiler testing; method focuses on semantic correctness via miscompilation bug finding.

kept.title: Artemis: Toward Accurate Detection of Server-Side Request Forgeries through LLM-Assisted Inter-procedural Path-Sensitive Taint Analysis.
kept.reason: Uses LLM-assisted static taint analysis for detecting SSRF vulnerabilities, integrating AI with program analysis for semantic correctness.

kept.title: Verification of Bit-Flip Attacks against Quantized Neural Networks.
kept.reason: Formal verification (abstract interpretation, MILP) of neural network robustness against bit-flip attacks, integrating PL/formal methods with AI model security.

kept.title: Automated Discovery of Tactic Libraries for Interactive Theorem Proving.
kept.reason: Automates discovery of custom tactics for ITPs (Lean, Rocq), a formal tool, using learned proof strategies.

kept.title: What's in the Box: Ergonomic and Expressive Capture Tracking over Generic Data Structures.
kept.reason: Presents a formal type system (capture tracking) for effect/resource safety, with mechanized proofs. LLM connection is weak, but PL/formal methods contribution is strong.

kept.title: Multi-Language Probabilistic Programming.
kept.reason: Multi-language PPL foundation; uses neural network for soft evidence in program analysis.
